what: The CORRECT fix for the C2 race: the locked subject engine (fixtures/engines/locked.mjs) serializes read-match-mutate behind a FIFO mutex, so critical-section entry order == submission order even though the per-id seeded variable-latency hook is still awaited and races. The C2 live arm (gate.sh --differential --engine fixtures/engines/locked.mjs --seeds 200) is GREEN across all 200 seeds: the concurrent whole-output equals the submission-order serial replay at every index. `expected_trades` + `expected_book` are that reference serial replay (reference/matcher.mjs) over the same order stream — the locked engine reproduces them exactly. This is a known-good (expected pass) case: the gate MUST NOT false-RED it.

live_provenance.result: GREEN across all 200 seeds (concurrent whole-output == submission-order serial replay)
live_provenance.note: expected_trades/expected_book = reference serial replay; locked engine matches them for every seed.
